name: Deep Night The Series: The Two of Us
original_name: รักนี้มีแค่เรา
overview: With her son Khemthis openly flouting his love for the club's star turn Wela, Madame Freya continues to explore her own relationship with girlfriend Meiji. It becomes a deeply personal and poignant story about the unique pressures of navigating the modern-day fluid landscape of gender and sexuality, both for her son and for herself.
